message:
feat(monitor): add session termination cause detection and smart restart tests

Monitor improvements:
- detectSessionTerminationCause(): Diagnose why tmux session disappeared
  - Detects: tmux server not running, no sessions, session killed, unknown
- Enhanced logging on session loss with termination cause
- Better error messages for debugging session lifecycle issues

CLI updates:
- root.go: Minor adjustments for monitor integration

Tests:
- internal/robot/smart_restart_test.go: Test coverage for smart restart logic
  including restart triggers, cooldowns, and decision making

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
